title: Tetratic Combat Expanded
description: Adds compat between Better Combat and Tetra
body:
Compat mod for Tetra and Better Combat, updated for Minecraft 1.20+.

 

Supports various Tetra addons as well.

 

Note: Double-Headed tools will have to be Warforged before the combat system will work with them.

[Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/tetra-niche-materials-tetratic-combat-expanded) is a link for Niche Materials compat.
 

You are the creator of a Tetra addon and want to create compat?


[Check the wiki on Gitlab](https://gitlab.com/firelight-studios/minecraft/tetratic_combat/-/wikis/home 'wiki')
